frame_label: Prenup / Alimony as Reverse Dowry / Women as Golddiggers
generated_comment: Aajkal marriage bhi risk management jaisa ho gaya hai, yaar. Men should seriously think about prenups, because one divorce and half your life goes in alimony even if the girl was never really with you for the right reasons. 498A ka misuse bhi itna common hai, but nobody wants to talk about how one-sided the system has become for men.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it frames women broadly as financially opportunistic and suggests legal protections are mainly tools women use against men. It encodes the 'prenup as protection from women,' 'alimony as reverse dowry,' and '498A misuse/one-sided laws' manifestations.
original_frame: The Character Double Standard: Women with Male Connections are Loose, Men with Female Connections are Desirable
persona_text: You are Vikram. Age 35. Married. A man in Mumbai. You are at a party with colleagues. You notice your wife Neha laughing with a male colleague Ñ someone you know, someone she works with, someone you have met before. They are in a group of four people. Nothing is happening. But something in you shifts. You are now in the kitchen getting a drink and your male friend has come to stand next to you. You are telling him what you just saw and what you felt and what you think about Neha's friendships with male colleagues and what a wife should understand about how these things look.
